content:
[Discord #DM from Lafou]
Cool. Now send Nova Chat a message. Also, could you see the image I posted in Nova Chat of your app?

I just sent a message to Nova Chat. 

As for the image you posted, I don't have the ability to view or access images posted in Nova Chat or any other platform. I can only see text-based messages and responses. 

If you'd like me to work with that image, you'd need to describe what you'd like me to do with it or provide specific instructions. I can't access or analyze images directly. 

Is there something specific you'd like me to help with regarding the image you posted?
